original_title: AKDL-045 "I love you, I'm sorry ... I can't do it. - Mizuki Yayoi
overview: Mizuki has lived alone with her mother who works for snacks since she was little. A mother married a hotel man six years ago and has a father-in-law. Mizuki, who had longed for the existence of a father from a young age with his father-in-law who has a gentle personality, soon became friends, and the sense of distance between the two became shorter than that of their parents. Due to the excessive expression of affection from Mizuki, the father-in-law, who has been struck by the devil, reaches out to Mizuki ... Two years have passed since then. Mizuki shoots a video for her father-in-law and reveals her feelings ... [Relatives, children, forbidden relationships, fathers loved by daughters] [Campaign] Customers who purchase the target work during the sale period will receive a special limited video! [About bonus video gifts] Bonus videos will be automatically added to your purchased products (videos) around October 8th (Friday). There is no individual notification when adding. Depending on the number of purchases of the target work, a special limited video (up to 2 types) of the campaign actress will be presented! Purchase 2 target works for each sale period → Randomly present 1 type of privilege video of the target sale ・ Purchase 3 or more points → Present all 2 types of privilege video of the target sale The privilege video differs for each sale period (all) 10 types) [Bonus video performers] 1st: Yua Mikami 2nd: Eimi Fukada 3rd: Karen Kaede 4th: Yu Shinoda 5th: Ichika Matsumoto [Sale period] 2021 7 March 30th (Friday) 10:00 to September 3, 2021 (Friday) 10:00 First: July 30, 2021 (Friday) 10:00 to August 6, 2021 (Friday) 10 : 00 2nd: Friday, August 6, 2021 10: 00-Friday, August 13, 2021 10:00 3rd: Friday, August 13, 2021 10: 00-2021 August 20th (Friday) 10:00 4th: 2021 August 20th (Friday) 10: 00-2021 August 27th (Friday) 10:00 5th: 2021 August 27th (Friday) (Friday) 10:00 to September 3, 2021 (Friday) 10:00 [Target works] Works with the notation [50% OFF sale 3rd] in the title. [Caution] ・ This campaign is limited to customers who purchased the target work between 10:00 on July 30, 2021 (Friday) and 10:00 on September 3, 2021 (Friday).・ If it has not been added within 1 month after the end of all sale periods, please contact DMM Support.
